About Us Donate Now
AMMAPARIVAAR NGO IS WORKING 24/7 TO SAVE HUMANITY &To Create A BETTER SOCIETY AND MAKE INDIA BETTER CONTRY

WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT

Each day, we count our blessings.
Each day, our Children pray to each of you who have been a blessing to us.
Each day, we thank God for your continued support.
God Bless you for making our Children happy. God Bless you for touching and shaping the lives of our Children. We are very grateful to you.
